[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00111110 5
1 01011100 4
2 11111110 7
3 11111111 a
4 00111111 6
5 01011100 4
6 11111111 a
7 11111111 a

01 10 11111111 a match 3 6 7
12 21 11011111 7
23 32 00011111 5
34 43 00011001 3
45 54 11001111 6
56 65 11001111 6
67 76 11111111 a match 3 6 7
70 07 10111011 6

02 20 00101111 5
13 31 11011111 7
24 42 00001111 4
35 53 11011111 7
46 64 11001111 6
57 75 11111111 a match 3 6 7
60 06 11101110 6
71 17 11111111 a match 3 6 7

03 30 00111010 4
14 41 11011111 7
25 52 11001111 6
36 63 11011110 6
47 74 10111011 6
50 05 11101111 7
61 16 11011111 7
72 27 10111111 7

04 40 00101011 4
15 51 11011111 7
26 62 11000111 5
37 73 10111011 6
